body:
When a NetCDF file specifies that `Missing` is part of the type of the temporal dimension, ClimaAnalysis does not convert the dates to seconds. However, if the temporal dimension does not contain `missing``, the dates should be converted to times relative to the start date.

TODO
- [x] Add a test for this bug
- [x] Add an item to NEWS.md
title: Fix bug with missing in time dimension
